dow_encoding_note: Cyclical sin/cos encoding preserves Mon~Sun adjacency.
lag_note: same_dow_ewm = 0.5*lag7+0.3*lag14+0.15*lag21+0.05*lag28. trend7vs14 = roll7-roll14 captures demand momentum. Recursive forecasting for horizon days whose lag-7 is not in training history.
bias_correction: x0.96 multiplier compensates systematic over-prediction in low-demand months.
insights: Lag-7 autocorrelation = 0.76: same-weekday last week is the strongest single predictor.
same_dow_ewm is more stable than lag-7 alone; critical for the week after an anomalous day.
trend7vs14 captures seasonal descent (Nov->Dec->Jan) faster than the model alone.
holiday_weekday interaction: weekday holidays cut demand ~30%, weekend holidays ~10%.
Asymmetric 2:1 loss means a slight downward bias is preferable to over-predicting.
limitation: Bias correction estimated from a single val window; could be cross-validated.
